_desc: First-arrival capture: alice sends 100ms before bob. Both arrive at hub. Alice has 2dB SNR advantage (>1dB locked, <6dB unlocked). With old 6dB model both would collide. With timing-dependent model, alice's preamble locks before bob arrives, so alice survives at 1dB threshold.

expect._comment: alice's packet survives via first-arrival capture (2dB > 1dB locked threshold)
